overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a sunny urban environment in GTA V's Los Santos, starting at the Del Perro intersection, proceeding along commercial sidewalks, crossing busy streets with traffic, and ending at a multi-story parking garage. The footage features golden hour lighting with clear skies and moderate vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with Del Perro sign

events.description: camera pans left to survey the intersection traffic before crossing
crossing the multi-lane intersection as vehicles pass by

agents.ego_description: standing at the intersection corner, observing traffic, then walking across the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: white box truck driving through the intersection
silver sedan cruising along the boulevard

entered.detail: large colorful commercial sign with dolphin logo and red text
tall palm trees lining the street against the hillside
multi-story glass and concrete building with balconies
distinctive round parking structure with red and white horizontal stripes

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a sunlit urban intersection dominated by the colorful Del Perro sign. The camera pans to survey traffic before crossing the street, passing palm trees and modern office buildings while vehicles drive through the intersection.

events.description: turning onto the sidewalk and entering the commercial storefront area
passing by the pharmacy building with green signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk past commercial buildings

notable_agents.action: person walking toward the camera on the narrow sidewalk

entered.detail: beige stucco building with green pharmacy signage and metal security grates
mature trees providing shade along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Walking along a commercial sidewalk lined with storefronts including a pharmacy with green signage. The path is shaded by trees on the left while buildings line the right, with occasional pedestrians passing by.

events.description: crossing the street as a red city bus passes by on the left
large semi truck with advertisement trailer passes closely on the right

agents.ego_description: crossing the street near the bus stop, then continuing along the road edge

notable_agents.action: red and white city bus driving along the boulevard
large semi truck with Redwood cigarette advertisement on trailer

entered.detail: tan rocky hills with sparse vegetation and distant city buildings
mature leafy trees lining the center median of the boulevard

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wider boulevard with views of distant rocky hills. The camera crosses near a passing red city bus and continues along the roadside as a large advertisement truck passes by, with the cylindrical parking garage becoming more prominent ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: public parking lot with spiral garage

events.description: entering the public parking lot from the main road
approaching the entrance of the multi-story parking garage

agents.ego_description: walking through the parking lot toward the cylindrical garage entrance

entered.detail: various parked cars including white sedans and red sports cars
white sign with red text and arrow indicating public parking entrance
red octagonal stop sign at the parking lot intersection

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a spacious parking lot filled with parked vehicles. The camera walks toward the distinctive cylindrical parking garage with its red and white striped facade, passing a stop sign and palm trees as the rocky hills recede into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant urban intersection toward the architectural silhouette of a cylindrical parking garage. It begins at the sunlit Del Perro intersection, panning across traffic and palm trees before crossing the street past modern office buildings. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts into a commercial corridor lined with storefronts and a green-signed pharmacy, shaded by a row of trees. The scene then opens onto a wider boulevard where the camera passes a red city bus and a large advertisement truck, revealing distant rocky hills as the parking structure looms ahead. Finally, the path leads into a spacious parking lot filled with vehicles, passing a stop sign and palm trees to arrive at the red and white striped facade of the garage.
